overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse with a lantern through grassy plains at night, accompanied by an NPC companion. The journey transitions from a dirt path to rocky terrain, ending at a waterfall where the character dismounts and explores on foot.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a dirt path with a lantern illuminating the ground ahead

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the horse on the left side

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland
tall green grass flanking the path
tall green grass flanking the path
large dark tree silhouetted against the night sky
dark starry sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night, accompanied by a walking companion. A lantern attached to the horse illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass and a large tree silhouetted against the starry sky.

events.description: terrain transitions from grassy dirt path to rocky ground near river
character dismounts the horse and continues on foot

agents.ego_description: riding slowly toward the river then dismounting to proceed on foot down the rocky slope

notable_agents.action: companion continues walking alongside, following the player toward the river

entered.detail: rocky ground with scattered stones replacing the dirt path
dark river water visible in the distance to the right
rocky cliff face rising beside the river

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from grassland to rocky ground as the character approaches a river canyon. The companion continues alongside as they navigate the stones, and the character dismounts the horse to proceed on foot toward the water's edge.

events.description: waterfall comes into view as character approaches the river edge

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the rocky riverbank approaching and passing the waterfall

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff into the river pool

segments.scene_description: On foot, the character explores the rocky riverbank, approaching a waterfall that cascades into the pool below. The character moves past the waterfall, which shifts from the right to the left of the frame as they continue along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a moonlit wilderness that transforms from open grasslands into a rugged river canyon. It begins with the camera trailing a character on horseback along a dirt trail, where a lantern casts a warm glow over tall grass and a silhouetted tree under a starry sky. As the path evolves, the soft grassland shifts into a rocky terrain, leading the group toward the edge of a canyon where the character dismounts to proceed on foot. The scene then opens up to a rocky riverbank, moving closer to a cascading waterfall that pours into a pool below. Finally, the camera follows the character as they navigate the cliff edge, with the waterfall shifting from the right to the left of the frame.
